en.title: Apache Spark & PySpark Fundamentals
en.description: Learn big data processing with Spark. Master RDDs, DataFrames, Spark SQL, and build your first distributed data pipelines with PySpark.

pt.title: Fundamentos de Apache Spark e PySpark
pt.description: Aprenda processamento de big data com Spark. Domine RDDs, DataFrames, Spark SQL e construa seus primeiros pipelines de dados distribuídos com PySpark.

es.title: Fundamentos de Apache Spark y PySpark
es.description: Aprende procesamiento de big data con Spark. Domina RDDs, DataFrames, Spark SQL y construye tus primeros pipelines de datos distribuidos con PySpark.
